title: CFA
description: This mod adds various changes and additions to minecraft 1.21.4
body:
# List of Additions:
- Custom Biomes
- Some Structures
- New Food Items
- One Whole new ore type (with tools excluding Shovels and Hoes.)
- Two New Woodsets
- Lots of Blocks and Items
> **Hopefully you'll have fun!**
- This mod will not be updated frequently.
